content.title: Smart Notification Rules

userStory.iWant: to configure team-wide notification rules that respect focus time
userStory.soThat: my team isn't interrupted during deep work but stays informed on blockers

acceptanceCriteria.given: I set a notification rule 'only P0 during focus'
acceptanceCriteria.when: a P1 notification fires during focus mode
the assignee is in focus mode
acceptanceCriteria.then: the notification breaks through focus mode with a distinct alert

implementationDetails: Rule engine: priority threshold per team with override capability
Notification priority classifier: P0 (blocker), P1 (urgent), P2 (normal), P3 (low)
Admin UI for Engineering Managers to configure team notification policies
